title: IntentSpec
description: Input contract for the QA UAT pipeline in free-form mode. Produced by the UserInterfaceQAFreeForm orchestrator agent.

run_id.description: Unique run identifier. Auto-generated if absent. Format: freeform-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.

intent_raw.description: The user's original natural-language intent, verbatim.
examples: Quiero crear un compromiso de pago para el cliente 12345

goal_action.description: Normalized action label derived by the orchestrator from intent_raw.

entry_screen.description: Primary Agenda Web screen where the flow begins.

navigation_path.description: Ordered list of Agenda Web screens the flow traverses.

test_cases.description: Test cases derived from the intent. Same structure as plan_pruebas[] in uat_ticket_reader output.

examples: Verificar que se crea el compromiso de pago exitosamente

datos.description: Input data for the test case. May contain {{PLACEHOLDER}} tokens resolved by orchestrator.

examples: El compromiso queda guardado y aparece en la lista con estado VIGENTE

resolved_data.description: Map of placeholder tokens to resolved values. Populated iteratively as data_requests are resolved.

pending_data.description: List of placeholder fields not yet resolved. Populated by intent_parser. Empty when all resolved.

orchestrator_notes.description: Free-text notes from the orchestrator agent about the intent or resolution steps.
examples: Cliente encontrado en RIDIOMA con estado ACTIVO. Lote activo: 987.
